lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.08]Dance the cay, dance the cay!
[00:03.66]Move your feet the Sea Star way!
[00:07.12]Spin around and clap your hands,
[00:10.78]Dance the cay with all your friends!
[00:14.42]Dance the cay, dance the cay!
[00:18.00]Move your feet the Sea Star way!
[00:21.58]Wiggle, jiggle, jump, repeat,
[00:25.12]Dance the cay — best beat on the street!
[00:30.22]Dance the cay! Yeah yeah yeah!
[00:31.84]Dance the cay! Hey hey hey!
